signals.name: Aux 12V battery age
signals.description: Confirmed responding on 726. Displays raw days converted to hours (A*24).

signals.name: Battery age raw counter
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Raw age counter; likely days. Latest test showed 153.

signals.name: Aux 12V battery state of charge
signals.description: Confirmed responding on 726. Raw percent-style value.

signals.name: Battery charge 4028 div255 compare
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula A*100/255; latest test showed about 32–33%. Kept as secondary battery charge value.

signals.name: Aux 12V battery voltage
signals.description: Confirmed responding on 726. Formula A/20 + 6.

signals.name: Aux 12V battery current
signals.description: Working on 726. Formula A-127; sign direction still needs confirmation. Unit aligned to Pelican schema: amps.

signals.name: Alternator current output
signals.description: Working/plausible. Unit aligned to Pelican schema: amps.

signals.name: Grille shutter duty cycle
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula A*100/255.

signals.name: Ambient air temperature sensor voltage
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val * 0.0048875855.

signals.name: A/C refrigerant pressure
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Raw signed kPa; sanity check units/value.

signals.name: A/C compressor pressure sensor voltage
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val / 1024.

signals.name: Ambient air temperature
signals.description: Working; close to dash ambient.

signals.name: Accelerator pedal position
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Showed 0–4% during testing. Used as the practical throttle-position connectable on this diesel because generic throttle-position candidates were rejected.

signals.name: Distance with MIL
signals.description: Confirmed responding.

signals.name: Warm-ups since DTC clear
signals.description: Confirmed responding.

signals.name: Distance since DTC clear
signals.description: Working diagnostic distance counter. Added as distance since DTCs cleared connectable.

signals.name: AdBlue tank level
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Showed around 17 L after recent fill; plausible against approx 18.5 L tank. Best AdBlue quantity candidate so far.

signals.name: AdBlue tank temperature
signals.description: Confirmed responding. AdBlue tank temperature.

signals.name: DPF / exhaust filter fullness
signals.description: Everest-confirmed DPF fullness / soot-load signal. Formula raw / 100. Validated during captured active DPF regen by a strong drop from high soot load to post-regen values, alongside the distance-since-regen reset. Dash display correlation is still being monitored because the vehicle display may be rounded, smoothed or modelled differently.

signals.name: TEST DPF fullness 0610 raw AB
signals.description: Testing companion for the confirmed DPF fullness packet. Shows the raw first 16-bit word used by EVEREST_DPF_FULLNESS_0610 before /100 scaling. Keep while monitoring dash correlation. Companion byte-offset scouts were added in v0.7.16 using Pelican fmt.bix. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST DPF 0610 byte CD raw
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset decode for the second 16-bit word of PID 220610. Added after DB logs showed later bytes in the 0610 packet moving independently of the promoted first-word DPF fullness value. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST DPF 0610 byte CD div100
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset decode for the second 16-bit word of PID 220610 using raw/100. Compare against dash DPF display, DPF fullness, exhaust flow, and regen events. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: Distance since DPF regen
signals.description: Everest-confirmed. Formula raw / 10 km. Validated during captured regen completion: distance since regen reset from about 125.8 km to 0.5 km, then immediately counted upward again. Strong production signal.

signals.name: EGR open percentage
signals.description: Working.

signals.name: Exhaust manifold EGT pre-turbo
signals.description: Working/plausible.

signals.name: Engine load
signals.description: Working engine load percentage. Added as engine load connectable.

signals.name: Coolant temperature
signals.description: Working; matched built-in ECT.

signals.name: Engine speed
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val / 4.

signals.name: Engine run time
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Raw seconds.

signals.name: Actual engine percent torque
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula A-125.

signals.name: Engine reference torque
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Raw N·m value.

signals.name: Intercooler air charge temperature
signals.description: Working charge-air / post-intercooler temperature candidate. Added as a custom connectable using intercoolerAirChargeTemperature.

signals.name: Cylinder head temperature sensor 2
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val / 64.

signals.name: Intake temperature fault status
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Showed 0; likely no intake temperature fault.

signals.name: Intake air temperature sensor voltage
signals.description: Responds but showed 0 V during test. Keep as low-confidence candidate; compare later.

signals.name: Intake air temperature
signals.description: Working.

signals.name: Engine oil temperature
signals.description: Working. Equation A-40. Added as engine oil temperature connectable.

signals.name: Manifold absolute pressure sensor voltage
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val * 0.0009765625.

signals.name: Wastegate duty cycle
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val*100/32768.

signals.name: Manifold pressure
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula A*10000/68947.

signals.name: TEST F40B calculated boost fixed offset
signals.description: Testing only. F40B manifold pressure converted to approximate gauge boost by subtracting fixed 14.5 psi atmospheric offset. Live BARO-based boost would be better if supported.

signals.name: TEST F40B calculated boost kPa fixed offset
signals.description: Testing only. F40B manifold pressure treated as kPa absolute and converted to approximate gauge boost by subtracting fixed 100 kPa atmospheric offset. Added to compare against Generic MAP gauge boost in the same unit family. Live BARO-based boost would be better if supported.

signals.name: Oil life remaining
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Latest test showed 47%. Preferred raw-percent oil life signal.

signals.name: Generic manifold absolute pressure
signals.description: Generic SAE OBD-II MAP value, confirmed responding on the Everest. Kept under Engine.Generic because it is not an Everest-specific Ford enhanced PID.

signals.name: TEST Generic MAP gauge boost 010B fixed offset
signals.description: Testing only. Generic MAP converted to approximate gauge boost using fixed sea-level offset A-101 kPa. Watch for 255 kPa absolute cap under high load.

signals.name: TEST Generic MAP gauge boost 010B psi fixed offset
signals.description: Testing only. Generic MAP converted to approximate gauge boost in psi using fixed sea-level offset. Formula approximately A*0.145038-14.65. Added so 010B can be compared directly against the F40B psi boost candidate. Watch for the 255 kPa absolute cap under high load.

signals.name: Generic mass air flow rate
signals.description: Generic SAE OBD-II mass air flow rate, confirmed responding on the Everest. Kept under Engine.Generic because it is not an Everest-specific Ford enhanced PID.

signals.name: Distance to empty displayed
signals.description: Confirmed against dash at 336 km. Formula raw/10. Added as fuel range connectable.

signals.name: Fuel remaining
signals.description: Working. Equation A*100/255.

signals.name: Fuel temperature
signals.description: Working.

signals.name: Low-pressure fuel pump commanded duty cycle
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val * 0.0030517578.

signals.name: High-pressure fuel rail sensor voltage
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val / 204.6.

signals.name: High-pressure fuel pressure desired
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val * 1.4503773969.

signals.name: Low-pressure fuel pressure desired
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula A*435/1000.

signals.name: Low-pressure fuel pressure actual
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val*10000/137892.

signals.name: Low-pressure fuel pressure sensor voltage
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val / 1024.

signals.name: Generic fuel level
signals.description: Generic SAE OBD-II fuel level, confirmed responding on the Everest. Kept under Fuel.Generic because it is not an Everest-specific Ford enhanced PID. Not used as the active fuel-level connectable; Everest-specific F42F is preferred.

signals.name: Vehicle speed Ford extended raw
signals.description: Confirmed working Ford extended vehicle speed. Raw value reads about 4 km/h below dashboard; kept as raw speed connectable.

signals.name: Vehicle speed Ford extended corrected
signals.description: Ford extended vehicle speed with +4 km/h display correction to better match the dashboard. Use this as the practical speed connectable.

signals.name: Front right wheel speed
signals.description: Confirmed working Ford wheel speed PID. Promoted from testing. Confirmed Ford wheel-speed PID; kept as a parameter only, not a speed connectable.

signals.name: Front left wheel speed
signals.description: Confirmed working Ford wheel speed PID. Promoted from testing. Confirmed Ford wheel-speed PID; kept as a parameter only, not a speed connectable.

signals.name: Rear right wheel speed
signals.description: Confirmed working Ford wheel speed PID. Promoted from testing. Confirmed Ford wheel-speed PID; kept as a parameter only, not a speed connectable.

signals.name: Rear left wheel speed
signals.description: Confirmed working Ford wheel speed PID. Promoted from testing. Confirmed Ford wheel-speed PID; kept as a parameter only, not a speed connectable.

signals.name: Lateral angle
signals.description: Working Ford lateral-angle parameter. Observed about -1 deg; verify orientation on level ground.

signals.name: Lateral acceleration
signals.description: Working Ford lateral-acceleration parameter. Formula raw/50; observed live values around -0.14 to 0.4. Unit aligned to Pelican schema: gravity.

signals.name: Odometer
signals.description: Working candidate; confirm exact dash odometer.

signals.name: Transmission fluid temperature
signals.description: Promoted to primary Everest transmission-fluid-temperature candidate after Pelican drive comparison. Same 7E1 221E1C TCM response as the 5/72 value; div16 warm-up and operating range looked more plausible against coolant, oil temperature, speed/load, and normal 10-speed behaviour. Validate against FORScan/factory scan data when available.

signals.name: Transmission fluid temperature compare
signals.description: Comparison/legacy transmission fluid temperature decode using 5/72 scaling. Retained beside the preferred div16 Everest transmission temperature for validation only; no suggestedMetric.

signals.name: Transmission gear commanded
signals.description: Working; tested 1 and 9.

signals.name: Transmission current gear
signals.description: Working current gear indicator from 7E1/221E1F. Primary current-gear connectable. Use alongside the alternate 7E0/221E12 current gear signal for comparison.

signals.name: Torque converter slip speed
signals.description: Confirmed working torque converter slip RPM.

signals.name: Transmission output shaft speed
signals.description: Confirmed working as driveline output shaft RPM. Not direct road speed without conversion.

signals.name: Transmission input shaft speed
signals.description: Confirmed working as input/turbine shaft RPM. Not direct road speed.

signals.name: TEST DPF regen state/request F451 raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for F451. During captured regen the decoded F451 candidate showed value 4. Keep as evidence/raw companion until the state meaning is confirmed outside regen.

signals.name: TEST DPF regen state/request F451
signals.description: Testing only. Responded with value 4 during captured active DPF regen while DPF fullness fell and distance-since-regen reset. Keep for non-regen comparison to determine whether 4 means active/requested/allowed or another state.

signals.name: TEST exhaust flow 019E raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for 019E exhaust-flow candidate. Captured active regen/load testing showed strong movement from about 185 to 3583 raw, closely tracking exhaust/load changes. Keep for scaling comparison.

signals.name: TEST exhaust flow 019E div5
signals.description: Testing only. Exhaust-flow 019E raw/5 candidate. Alive and responsive during active regen/load capture, but likely high. Keep for comparison against div10/div20/div50 and EGT/load.

signals.name: TEST exhaust flow 019E div10
signals.description: Testing only. Exhaust-flow 019E raw/10 candidate. Alive and responsive during active regen/load capture. Keep for comparison; div20 currently looks more plausible.

signals.name: TEST exhaust flow 019E div20 likely
signals.description: Testing only. Exhaust-flow 019E raw/20 candidate. Active regen/load capture showed strong correlation with flow/load; current best scaling candidate among div5/div10/div20/div50, pending more validation against RPM/load/EGT.

signals.name: TEST exhaust flow 019E div50
signals.description: Testing only. Exhaust-flow 019E raw/50 candidate. Alive and responsive during active regen/load capture, but may be low. Keep for comparison against div20.

signals.name: TEST EGT11 F46A raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for EGT11. Candidate EGT formula raw*0.1-40 C. Compare with known 220569 and regen heat rise.

signals.name: TEST EGT11 F46A
signals.description: Testing only. Candidate EGT formula raw*0.1-40 C. Compare with known 220569 and regen heat rise.

signals.name: TEST EGT14 DPF outlet F46D raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for EGT14 DPF outlet. Candidate EGT formula raw*0.1-40 C. Compare with known 220569 and regen heat rise.

signals.name: TEST EGT14 DPF outlet F46D
signals.description: Testing only. Candidate EGT formula raw*0.1-40 C. Compare with known 220569 and regen heat rise.

signals.name: TEST exhaust multi-EGT F478 raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. PID is alive and appears packet-like, but decode is not confirmed. Keep raw first word for future EGT/regen analysis.

signals.name: TEST exhaust multi-EGT F478 candidate
signals.description: Testing only. Candidate formula raw*0.1 - 40 C for first word. Needs comparison against existing EGT 220569 and active regen behaviour before promotion.

signals.name: TEST TCC desired slip 1E35 raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for TCC desired slip. Compare against confirmed 1E14 actual slip.

signals.name: TEST TCC desired slip 1E35
signals.description: Strong testing candidate. Formula raw/4 rpm. Latest drive showed 1023 rpm with commanded pressure at zero during an open/unlocked converter state, then about 4–5 rpm as pressure applied and slip approached zero. Treat 1023 rpm as a likely sentinel/open-converter value until repeated.

signals.name: TEST TCC commanded pressure 1E3C raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for TCC commanded pressure. Possible TCC commanded pressure.

signals.name: TEST TCC commanded pressure 1E3C
signals.description: Strong live TCC apply-command candidate. Latest drive showed zero while the converter appeared open, then rising values as desired slip fell from the 1023 rpm sentinel toward 4–5 rpm and zero. Current kilopascal unit is provisional and not yet proven.

signals.name: Transmission current gear alt
signals.description: Promoted from TESTING.Transmission in v0.7.11. 7E0/221E12 matched the dash gear during live driving and changed at the same time as the dash gear display. Kept as an alternate current-gear signal because another working transmission current gear indicator already exists. Raw 70 is mapped as not in gear / unavailable based on stopped/end-state log evidence. Added scalar unit for Pelican schema alignment.

signals.name: TEST BARO reference 0133
signals.description: Testing only. SAE barometric pressure reference. Recent drive log showed a stable 100-101 kPa, which is expected for BARO. Keep as boost-reference data rather than treating it as dead because it changes slowly.

signals.name: TEST boost pressure packet 0170 raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for SAE/Ranger boost-control packet 0170. Latest captures showed live but small movement around raw 1805-1821; keep as alive scout for load/WOT comparison. Companion byte-offset scouts were added in v0.7.16 using Pelican fmt.bix. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST boost pressure packet 0170 cd raw16
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset scout for boost pressure packet 0170. Added to inspect later packet words without relying only on the first A/B word. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST boost pressure packet 0170 ef raw16
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset scout for boost pressure packet 0170. Added to inspect later packet words without relying only on the first A/B word. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST boost packet 0170 shifted BC raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted 16-bit field from Mode 01 PID 70 using bix 8. Latest drive showed the packet begins with a stable 0x07 prefix, making this BC field a stronger command/actual boost-control candidate than the original AB decode.

signals.name: TEST boost packet 0170 shifted DE raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted second 16-bit field from Mode 01 PID 70 using bix 24. Compare against shifted BC, F470 packet fields, MAP, BARO, load and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST boost packet 0170 shifted FG raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted third 16-bit field from Mode 01 PID 70 using bix 40. Retained as a raw packet scout until its state relationship is understood.

signals.name: TEST boost packet 0170 shifted IJ raw
signals.description: Testing only. Later shifted 16-bit field from Mode 01 PID 70 using bix 64. Added because latest packets ended with a small live/status-style value after several zero bytes.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for VGT commanded. Possible VGT/turbo vane commanded position.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470
signals.description: Testing only. Possible VGT/turbo vane commanded position.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 div100
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT commanded scaling using raw / 100 percent-style candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 div64
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT commanded scaling using raw / 64 percent-style candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 div32
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT commanded scaling using raw / 32 percent-style candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 div20
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT commanded scaling using raw / 20 percent-style candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 div10
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT commanded scaling using raw / 10 scalar candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 shifted BC raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted BC packet field from F470 using bix 8. Added after the latest drive showed a leading support/status byte and multi-field packet behaviour. Compare command versus actual, 0170 shifted fields, load, RPM, MAP and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 shifted DE raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted DE packet field from F470 using bix 24. Added after the latest drive showed a leading support/status byte and multi-field packet behaviour. Compare command versus actual, 0170 shifted fields, load, RPM, MAP and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 shifted FG raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted FG packet field from F470 using bix 40. Added after the latest drive showed a leading support/status byte and multi-field packet behaviour. Compare command versus actual, 0170 shifted fields, load, RPM, MAP and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST VGT commanded F470 shifted IJ raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted IJ packet field from F470 using bix 64. Added after the latest drive showed a leading support/status byte and multi-field packet behaviour. Compare command versus actual, 0170 shifted fields, load, RPM, MAP and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for VGT actual. Possible VGT/turbo vane actual position.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471
signals.description: Testing only. Possible VGT/turbo vane actual position.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 div100
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT actual scaling using raw / 100 percent-style candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 div64
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT actual scaling using raw / 64 percent-style candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 div32
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT actual scaling using raw / 32 percent-style candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 div20
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT actual scaling using raw / 20 percent-style candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 div10
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate 16-bit VGT actual scaling using raw / 10 scalar candidate. Added after raw AB moved while original A-byte percent display stayed around 3%.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 shifted BC raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted BC packet field from F471 using bix 8. Added after the latest drive showed a leading support/status byte and multi-field packet behaviour. Compare command versus actual, 0170 shifted fields, load, RPM, MAP and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 shifted DE raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted DE packet field from F471 using bix 24. Added after the latest drive showed a leading support/status byte and multi-field packet behaviour. Compare command versus actual, 0170 shifted fields, load, RPM, MAP and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 shifted FG raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted FG packet field from F471 using bix 40. Added after the latest drive showed a leading support/status byte and multi-field packet behaviour. Compare command versus actual, 0170 shifted fields, load, RPM, MAP and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST VGT actual F471 shifted IJ raw
signals.description: Testing only. One-byte-shifted IJ packet field from F471 using bix 64. Added after the latest drive showed a leading support/status byte and multi-field packet behaviour. Compare command versus actual, 0170 shifted fields, load, RPM, MAP and accelerator position.

signals.name: TEST F47A turbo packet raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw first-word companion for F47A. The previous rpm candidate stayed fixed and has been removed; keep raw AB only as a low-confidence scout because later packet bytes may still contain useful data if byte offsets become available. Companion byte-offset scouts were added in v0.7.16 using Pelican fmt.bix. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST F47A turbo packet cd raw16
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset scout for F47A turbo packet. Added to inspect later packet words without relying only on the first A/B word. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST F47A turbo packet ef raw16
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset scout for F47A turbo packet. Added to inspect later packet words without relying only on the first A/B word. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST turbo packet F47A shifted BC raw
signals.description: Testing only. Shifted BC field after the leading packet byte. Latest drive usually showed zero; retained as packet structure evidence.

signals.name: TEST turbo packet F47A shifted DE raw
signals.description: Testing only. Shifted DE field after the leading packet byte. Latest drive showed live values such as about 100, 200 and 860. Treat as turbo-control data, not turbo RPM.

signals.name: TEST turbo packet F47A shifted FG raw
signals.description: Testing only. Shifted FG field after the leading packet byte. Moved with the DE field during the latest drive; possible command/feedback or duty/status companion. Do not label as turbo speed.

signals.name: TEST fuel rate 015E
signals.description: Testing only. Strong direct fuel-rate candidate. Latest screenshots showed plausible live values around 0.3, 1.4, 5.4 and 13.5, likely L/h style behaviour; compare against load/throttle/019D.

signals.name: TEST fuel rate alt 019D raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for 019D fuel-rate alternate. Latest screenshots show raw values 3, 29, 62, 155 tracking fuel demand/load.

signals.name: TEST fuel rate alt 019D div50
signals.description: Testing only. Current 019D fuel-rate alternate scaling. Latest screenshots show raw/50 tracks load but reads lower than 015E; keep alongside div10/div20/div100.

signals.name: TEST fuel rate alt 019D div10
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate fuel-rate scaling for 019D; latest screenshots show raw values tracking fuel rate/load strongly.

signals.name: TEST fuel rate alt 019D div20
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate fuel-rate scaling for 019D; compare against 015E fuel-rate candidate.

signals.name: TEST fuel rate alt 019D div100
signals.description: Testing only. Alternate fuel-rate scaling for 019D; compare against 015E and vehicle load.

signals.name: TEST fuel rail packet 016D raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Ranger-supported fuel rail packet raw scout. Latest screenshots show live raw values around 1801–1853; keep for future packet decoding. Companion byte-offset scouts were added in v0.7.16 using Pelican fmt.bix. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST fuel rail packet 016D cd raw16
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset scout for fuel rail packet 016D. Added to inspect later packet words without relying only on the first A/B word. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST fuel rail packet 016D ef raw16
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset scout for fuel rail packet 016D. Added to inspect later packet words without relying only on the first A/B word. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST fuel rail packet 016D shifted BC raw
signals.description: Testing only. First useful shifted 16-bit field after the stable 0x07 prefix. Latest drive showed this field rising strongly with load and closely tracking the shifted DE field, consistent with a requested/actual fuel-pressure pair.

signals.name: TEST fuel rail packet 016D shifted DE raw
signals.description: Testing only. Second useful shifted 16-bit field after the packet prefix. Strong candidate for the companion requested/actual fuel-pressure value; engineering scale remains unresolved.

signals.name: TEST fuel rail packet 016D byte F raw
signals.description: Testing only. Status/support-style byte following the two strong shifted 16-bit fuel-pressure fields. Latest drive often showed 0x41.

signals.name: Driver demand torque
signals.description: Promoted from testing. SAE Mode 01 PID 61. Confirmed live: rises with accelerator/load demand and can show 0% while coasting.

signals.name: Actual engine torque
signals.description: Promoted from testing. SAE Mode 01 PID 62. Confirmed live: tracks delivered engine torque/load and can show 0% while coasting.

signals.name: Engine reference torque
signals.description: Promoted from testing. SAE Mode 01 PID 63. Confirmed stable around 500 N·m; useful reference value for torque percent interpretation.

signals.name: TEST EGR command actual packet 0169 raw AB
signals.description: Testing only. Raw companion for SAE/Ranger EGR command/actual packet 0169. Latest captures showed live movement around raw 1792-1846; keep as alive scout for correlation against EGR open percentage, RPM and load. Companion byte-offset scouts were added in v0.7.16 using Pelican fmt.bix. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST EGR command actual packet 0169 cd raw16
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset scout for EGR command actual packet 0169. Added to inspect later packet words without relying only on the first A/B word. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST EGR command actual packet 0169 ef raw16
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte-offset scout for EGR command actual packet 0169. Added to inspect later packet words without relying only on the first A/B word. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST EGR packet 0169 byte B raw
signals.description: Testing only. First useful byte after the stable 0x07 packet prefix. Compare with EGR open percentage, load, RPM, fuel and regen state.

signals.name: TEST EGR packet 0169 byte B percent
signals.description: Testing only. Byte B scaled as A*100/255 after the packet prefix. Candidate commanded or actual EGR percentage.

signals.name: TEST EGR packet 0169 byte C raw
signals.description: Testing only. Second useful byte after the packet prefix. Retained raw for command/actual/error comparison.

signals.name: TEST EGR packet 0169 byte C percent
signals.description: Testing only. Byte C scaled as A*100/255. Compare with byte B percent and production EGR open percentage.

signals.name: TEST EGR packet 0169 byte D raw
signals.description: Testing only. Third useful byte after the packet prefix. May be EGR error, limit, status or another requested/actual value.

signals.name: TEST EGR packet 0169 byte D percent
signals.description: Testing only. Byte D scaled as A*100/255 for comparison with bytes B and C.

signals.name: TEST EGR packet 0169 shifted BC raw
signals.description: Testing only. Shifted 16-bit BC field using bix 8. Added to preserve paired-field analysis alongside individual byte scouts.

signals.name: TEST EGR packet 0169 shifted CD raw
signals.description: Testing only. Shifted overlapping 16-bit CD field using bix 16. Compare against the individual B/C/D bytes before assigning meaning.

signals.name: TEST DPF status F48B byte C raw
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte C raw scout for F48B. Earlier active-regen DB evidence showed later bytes in the F48B packet changed while first A/AB decodes appeared fixed. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST DPF status F48B byte CD raw
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based second-word raw scout for F48B. Use for regen-state packet investigation only. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST DPF status F48B byte E raw
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte E raw scout for F48B. Added because later bytes changed during captured regen. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST DPF status F48B byte EF raw
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based third-word raw scout for F48B. Use for regen-state packet investigation only. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST DPF status F48B byte G raw
signals.description: Testing only. Pelican bix-based byte G raw scout for F48B where response length allows. Added for packet analysis; not a production signal. Dedicated BIX packet-scout group; retained because this PID previously responded but the first-word decode was frozen, low-value, or not fully decoded.

signals.name: TEST transmission shifter position
signals.description: Testing only. Ranger-derived 221E23 shifter-position map on 7E0→7E8. Validate Park, Reverse, Neutral, Drive and Manual independently from current transmission gear. Compare against EVEREST_CURRENT_GEAR_ALT_1E12 and the production current-gear signal.

signals.name: TEST generic fuel rail pressure raw
signals.description: Testing only. Raw 16-bit SAE Mode 01 PID 23 companion. Compare against the scaled value and shifted 016D BC/DE packet fields.

signals.name: TEST generic fuel rail gauge pressure
signals.description: Testing only. SAE Mode 01 PID 23 fuel rail gauge pressure using raw*10 kPa. Compare against shifted 016D BC and DE fields to identify requested-versus-actual rail pressure behaviour.

signals.name: TEST transmission temperature 7E0 mirror
signals.description: Testing only. Ranger-derived 7E0→7E8 mirror of PID 221E1C using raw/16 °C. Compare against the working Everest 7E1→7E9 production transmission-fluid-temperature signal for value, update rate and availability.
